ddls:
CREATE TABLE "database_connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database connection */,
  "connector_config" TEXT /* JSON object containing database connection details (connectURI, user, password, JDBC properties) */,
  "connection_status" TEXT /* Current status of the database connection */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of database connection */,
  "jdbc_properties" TEXT /* Additional JDBC properties */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the connection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the connection was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the database connection */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the database connection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lookup_tables" (
  "lookup_table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lookup table */,
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the database connection used for the lookup table */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the lookup table */,
  "key_column" TEXT /* Name of the column containing the lookup key */,
  "value_column" TEXT /* Name of the column containing the lookup value */,
  "lookup_table_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the lookup table */,
  "lookup_table_category" TEXT /* Category of the lookup table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lookup table was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lookup table was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the lookup table */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the lookup table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lookup_table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lookup_tables_connection_id FOREIGN KEY ("connection_id") REFERENCES database_connections ("connection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lookup_table_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lookup table configuration */,
  "lookup_table_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lookup table */,
  "streaming_fetch_size" INTEGER /* Fetch size used for streaming data */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lookup_table_configurations_lookup_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("lookup_table_id") REFERENCES lookup_tables ("lookup_table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, user) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "password_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the password will expire */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing permissions for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lookup_table_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "lookup_table_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lookup table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the lookup table was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the lookup table was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the lookup table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lookup_table_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lookup_table_access_lookup_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("lookup_table_id") REFERENCES lookup_tables ("lookup_table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "database_connection_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the database connection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database connection was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the database connection was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the database connection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_database_connection_access_connection_id FOREIGN KEY ("connection_id") REFERENCES database_connections ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_database_connection_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lookup_table_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lookup table version */,
  "lookup_table_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lookup table */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the lookup table */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lookup_table_versions_lookup_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("lookup_table_id") REFERENCES lookup_tables ("lookup_table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lookup_table_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update event */,
  "lookup_table_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lookup table */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lookup table version */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the lookup table was updated */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the update */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who made the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the history record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lookup_table_history_lookup_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("lookup_table_id") REFERENCES lookup_tables ("lookup_table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lookup_table_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES lookup_table_versions ("version_id")
)
